	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = epbm_estate_map key = building_type:peasants_training_grounds value = estate_type:peasants_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = epbm_estate_map key = building_type:pirate_haven value = estate_type:peasants_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = epbm_estate_map key = building_type:pirate_stronghold value = estate_type:peasants_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = epbm_estate_map key = building_type:rotten_borough value = estate_type:nobles_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = epbm_estate_map key = building_type:spiritual_retreat value = estate_type:clergy_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = epbm_estate_map key = building_type:toll_castle value = estate_type:nobles_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = epbm_estate_map key = building_type:warrior_monks_training_grounds value = estate_type:clergy_estate }

	# Crown buildings: upkeep routed to the crown-total bucket
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = epbm_crown_map key = building_type:admiralty value = yes }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = epbm_crown_map key = building_type:alhambra value = yes }
